concepts.title: Elliptic curves and Weierstrass models
concepts.blurb: A smooth genus-1 curve with basepoint admits Weierstrass equations and rich arithmetic.

concepts.title: Group law on cubic curves
concepts.blurb: Chord-tangent constructions define an abelian group on rational points.

concepts.title: The j-invariant and isomorphism classes
concepts.blurb: The j-invariant is a single number that classifies elliptic curves over an algebraically closed field up to isomorphism, and witnesses the coarse moduli space M_{1,1}.

concepts.title: Complex uniformization and CM
concepts.blurb: Over C every elliptic curve is a torus C/Λ; curves whose endomorphism ring is larger than Z have complex multiplication by an order in an imaginary quadratic field.

concepts.title: Mordell–Weil and invariants
concepts.blurb: Rational points form a finitely generated group with rank and torsion invariants.
